name: Hawaiian Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to the directions on the box.
2. Pour the batter into a greased 15" x 10-inch pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
4. Let it cool completely in the pan.
5. In a separate bowl, blend the pudding mix with milk until smooth.
6. Beat the cream cheese into the pudding mix until smooth.
7. Stir in the thawed Cool whip by hand.
8. Spread the pudding mixture evenly on top of the cooled cake.
9. Sprinkle crushed pineapple (1 can) over the pudding layer.
10. Sprinkle chopped nuts (optional), followed by Maraschino cherries (chopped from a small jar).
11. Finally, sprinkle with flaked coconut.
